Followers — tiebreaker only

Every reseller scored 0–100 each morning. Top 40 get a DM today. Open any lead to see their exact breakdown.

Who: The 40 Instagram resellers with the highest scores today. Each lead shows its type badge (RESELLER or RESELLER+EMAIL), stage chip, score and next action. Expand any lead to see exactly why they scored what they scored and the drafted DM that responds directly to their last message.
Action: Click, copy the DM, open Instagram link, paste, send. All 40 takes about 20 minutes.

RESELLER = Instagram DM only — identified from follower count and sales data, not the label. RESELLER+EMAIL = also has an email address in the raw data, detected automatically — two ways to reach them.
Green border / TODAY = in today's DM queue — full expandable card with message. Red border / GHOSTED = conversation went cold, re-engage as priority. All other leads show as compact rows with score and last reply visible. The Day 2 toggle updates this tab.

Hey @archiveatticvintage good question. It works as a straight purchase you buy the lot at wholesale (typically 38 per piece depending on category and grade), then sell at your margin. #178@cinderwaxfindsRESELLER+EMAILview ↗ghosted
0
£860/mo — “Happy to chat, mornings best.”
PHYSICAL SHOP = email + phone + city. No Instagram cap. Sequence: email first, then call, then visit. The Day 2 toggle updates this tab.
By stage: new = send intro email • contacted = no reply yet, follow up by phone • warm/replied = book a call or visit • negotiating = push to close • call booked = prep for the call • red border = ghosted, re-engage
Visit planning: Use the city chart above. Block a full day per city.
